Name: Login Form - Valid Email Format Acceptance
Precondition: User has a valid Creatio CRM account; Internet connection available
Objective: Verify that valid email formats are accepted without validation errors
Coverage (Pages): Login Page
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Chrome browser opens successfully.
Test Script (BDD): Given the user has Chrome browser installed

Coverage (Pages): 2. Enter the URL - https://accounts.creatio.com/login/alm and launch the application.
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: URL is entered and login page loads.
Test Script (BDD): When the user enters https://accounts.creatio.com/login/alm

Coverage (Pages): 3. Verify whether the cookies consent pop-up is displayed within the login page.
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Cookies consent pop-up is displayed on the login page.
Test Script (BDD): Then the login page displays a cookies consent pop-up

Coverage (Pages): 4. Click on 'Allow All' button and verify Cookies popup is closed.
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Cookies pop-up is dismissed and login form is visible.
Test Script (BDD): When the user clicks 'Allow All' button

Coverage (Pages): 5. Enter valid email format in the Business Email field.
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Email is entered without any error messages; no red highlighting on field.
Test Script (BDD): Then the user enters a valid email: user@example.com

Coverage (Pages): 6. Verify Business Email field accepts the input without validation errors.
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Email field remains white/default color; no validation error message appears.
Test Script (BDD): And the email field shows no validation errors

Coverage (Pages): 7. Click on the Password field.
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Password field is focused; cursor is visible in the field.
Test Script (BDD): Then the user clicks on the Password field

Coverage (Pages): 8. Verify user can proceed to next step without email errors.
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: User can successfully move to password field; email validation passed.
Test Script (BDD): And the user can proceed without email validation errors
